commissionerates.name: Hyderabad City
commissionerates.jurisdiction: Historic core city including Charminar, Abids, Nampally, Koti, Begumpet
commissionerates.key_strength: Dense CCTV surveillance, legacy infrastructure, SHE Team HQ

commissionerates.name: Cyberabad
commissionerates.jurisdiction: IT Corridor — Gachibowli, Madhapur, Raidurgam, Narsingi, Kondapur
commissionerates.key_strength: Specialized cyber wing, high-density commercial policing

commissionerates.name: Malkajgiri (Rachakonda)
commissionerates.jurisdiction: Eastern & south-eastern — Malkajgiri, Uppal, LB Nagar, Vanasthalipuram
commissionerates.key_strength: Expanding jurisdiction, rapid-response units for peri-urban areas

commissionerates.name: Fourth City (New)
commissionerates.key_strength: Under formation — designed for rapid population influx zones

specialized_units.name: SHE Teams
specialized_units.description: Women's safety patrol teams operating across all commissionerates. Mandate expanded post-2022.

specialized_units.name: Cybercrime Wing HQ
specialized_units.description: Centralized cybercrime investigation hub handling financial fraud, digital arrests, and OTP scams.

specialized_units.name: TGANB (Narcotics Bureau)
specialized_units.description: Telangana Anti-Narcotics Bureau — dedicated narcotics enforcement and drug seizure operations.

specialized_units.name: Traffic Police Wing
specialized_units.description: Digitized traffic enforcement division handling drunk driving, minor driving, and road safety.

cybercrime_typology.vulnerability: Economic anxiety, desire for remote work
Fear of state authority, psychological isolation
